headline: Inside ‘Project Eagle,’ JPMorgan’s High-Wire Act to Fund EA Deal
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The post from @realDonaldTrump landed at precisely 7:23 a.m. Inside JPMorgan Chase & Co., the final piece of Project Eagle was a go.For weeks, JPMorgan bankers had anxiously watched events in the Middle East as they worked to sell the financing for the biggest leveraged buyout ever, the $55-billion private equity takeover of video-game giant Electronic Arts Inc. headline: How Investors Are Reacting To KKR (KKR) Record Fundraising, Arctos Deal And New Platform Push
summary: Earlier this week, KKR outlined its expansion plans at the RBC Capital Markets Global Financial Institutions Conference 2026, highlighting a record US$129.00 billion raised in 2025, growth initiatives across new investment sectors, and its acquisition of Arctos to deepen exposure to sports franchise and GP solutions. A key angle for investors is how KKR’s emphasis on employee ownership and scaling new platforms such as sports and data-center infrastructure could shape the resilience and mix...
